data.description:
## What
Enrich the security overlay prompt with dso content: recall patterns AND FP-guards (both halves), per the
locked principle that domain rubric lives in the overlay, not the generic Pass-2 verifier. Recall: dso's 8 red-team concerns (authz completeness, taint flow to sinks, fail-open error handling, privilege escalation via side effects, crypto misuse, TOCTOU, trust boundaries, state-machine integrity). Hard exclusions defer to the gitleaks/opengrep DET criteria BY NAME. Rationalizations-to-reject: 'not directly exploitable => not a finding'.

## Files
- src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-security.md
- eval spec + fixtures for the security overlay (recall + no-fire cases)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] security overlay carries both recall patterns and FP-discrimination guards.
- [ ] Lands with a passing recall + no-fire eval; does not over-suppress valid patterns.
- [ ] Overlay remains advisory; no domain rubric leaks into code-review-verify.md.
data.title: security overlay enrichment
